creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ok, verified that if doing a
jail -c name=foo persist
jexec foo
^d
jexec foo
^d
jexec foo
^d
jexec foo
^d
jexec foo
^d
jail -r foo

I get a pr_ref = 5 left:

prison 0xfffff80009f59000:
 jid             = 1
 name            = foo
 parent          = 0xffffffff81b01960
 ref             = 5
 uref            = 0
 path            = /
...
